intended_use: Clever One is dental imaging software that is intended to provide tools for supporting diagnosis and treatment. These tools enable end users to view and interpret a series of DICOM compliant medical i
intended_use_full: Clever One is dental imaging software that is intended to provide tools for supporting diagnosis and treatment. These tools enable end users to view and interpret a series of DICOM compliant medical images and are intended for use by trained medical professionals. Clever One allows users to load, view, and save DICOM images from CT, panoramic, cephalometric, intraoral, and other imaging equipment. It also provides functionalities such as 2D viewing, 2D analysis, 3D visualization, 3D analysis.
other_metrics: Device passed all verification/validation and measurement accuracy tests based on pre-determined Pass/Fail criteria; cybersecurity risk management and verification/validation activities were conducted
